routing_rules.call_routing: calls are routed to Ben (owner) during business hours and after hours
routing_rules.emergency_calls: emergency calls are handled by Ben (owner) for select clients (e.g. regular property managers and general contractors)

emergency_definitions.emergency_situations: pumps going down at gas stations, other critical electrical issues
emergency_definitions.emergency_response: Ben (owner) or other electricians respond to emergency calls
